sections.title: Date paste
sections.text: a food product prepared from fruits of the date palm ( Phoenix dactylifera) that are sound, consistent in colour, harvested at the appropriate stage of maturity, washed, pitted and capped.

sections.title: 9. LABELLING
sections.text: The product shall be labelled in accordance with the Codex General Standard for the Labelling of Prepackaged Foods (CODEX STAN 1-1985), with the additional provisions that the label shall not be placed directly on the date paste, and that the following information shall appear on the container:
sections.retrieval_text:
9. LABELLING
number=9
level=1
The product shall be labelled in accordance with the Codex General Standard for the Labelling of Prepackaged Foods (CODEX STAN 1-1985), with the additional provisions that the label shall not be placed directly on the date paste, and that the following information shall appear on the container:
